name: Mollie
description: Mollie is a European payments API that lets you accept online payments via credit cards, iDEAL, Bancontact, PayPal, and many other methods. It provides a simple REST API for creating payments, managing refunds, handling customers, and setting up recurring subscriptions with strong European market coverage.

capabilities.name: payments_create
capabilities.description: Create a new payment to charge a customer. Returns a checkout URL where the customer completes the payment.

capabilities.name: payments_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the details and current status of an existing payment by its ID.

capabilities.name: payments_list
capabilities.description: List all payments created on your account, with pagination support.

capabilities.name: payments_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing payment with new details such as description, redirectUrl, or metadata.

capabilities.name: payments_cancel
capabilities.description: Cancel an existing payment that has not yet been completed.

capabilities.name: refunds_create
capabilities.description: Issue a full or partial refund for a completed payment.

capabilities.name: refunds_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the details of a specific refund by its ID.

capabilities.name: refunds_list
capabilities.description: List all refunds for a specific payment.

capabilities.name: refunds_cancel
capabilities.description: Cancel a refund that has not yet been processed.

capabilities.name: refunds_list_all
capabilities.description: List all refunds across your entire account.

capabilities.name: chargebacks_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the details of a specific chargeback.

capabilities.name: chargebacks_list
capabilities.description: List all chargebacks for a specific payment.

capabilities.name: chargebacks_list_all
capabilities.description: List all chargebacks across your entire account.

capabilities.name: captures_create
capabilities.description: Create a capture for an authorized payment to collect the funds.

capabilities.name: captures_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the details of a specific capture.

capabilities.name: captures_list
capabilities.description: List all captures for a specific payment.

capabilities.name: methods_list
capabilities.description: List all enabled payment methods available for your account.

capabilities.name: methods_list_all
capabilities.description: List all payment methods known to Mollie, including disabled ones.

capabilities.name: methods_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific payment method.

capabilities.name: orders_create
capabilities.description: Create a new order with one or more order lines.

capabilities.name: orders_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the details of an existing order by its ID.

capabilities.name: orders_list
capabilities.description: List all orders on your account with pagination.

capabilities.name: orders_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing order with new details.

capabilities.name: orders_cancel
capabilities.description: Cancel an existing order that has not been completed.

capabilities.name: customers_create
capabilities.description: Create a customer record to associate payments and enable recurring billing.

capabilities.name: customers_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the details of a specific customer.

capabilities.name: customers_list
capabilities.description: List all customers on your account.

capabilities.name: customers_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing customer's details.

capabilities.name: customers_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a customer record from your account.

capabilities.name: mandates_create
capabilities.description: Create a mandate for a customer to authorize recurring payments.

capabilities.name: mandates_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the details of a specific mandate.

capabilities.name: mandates_list
capabilities.description: List all mandates for a specific customer.

capabilities.name: mandates_revoke
capabilities.description: Revoke an existing mandate so it can no longer be used for payments.

capabilities.name: subscriptions_create
capabilities.description: Create a recurring subscription for a customer with a defined interval and amount.

capabilities.name: subscriptions_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the details of a specific subscription.

capabilities.name: subscriptions_list
capabilities.description: List all subscriptions for a specific customer.

capabilities.name: subscriptions_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing subscription's details.

capabilities.name: subscriptions_cancel
capabilities.description: Cancel an active subscription.

capabilities.name: shipments_create
capabilities.description: Create a shipment for an order to trigger fulfillment.

capabilities.name: shipments_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the details of a specific shipment.

capabilities.name: shipments_list
capabilities.description: List all shipments for a specific order.

capabilities.name: shipments_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing shipment's tracking information.

capabilities.name: profiles_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the details of the current profile.

capabilities.name: profiles_list
capabilities.description: List all profiles available on your account.

capabilities.name: balances_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific balance by its ID.

capabilities.name: balances_list
capabilities.description: List all balances on your account.

capabilities.name: settlements_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the details of a specific settlement.

capabilities.name: settlements_list
capabilities.description: List all settlements on your account.
